Class DeliveryRequest

java.lang.Object
model.DeliveryRequest
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class DeliveryRequest extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a medical request for organ delivery.
See Also:

    Method

    Cancels the request.

    Returns the medical staff member who created the request.

    Returns the collection center where the organ is available.

    Returns the priority level of the associated request.

    Returns the date and time when the request was created.

    Returns the current status of the request.

  • Constructor Details

    • DeliveryRequest

      public DeliveryRequest(String id, String organType, PriorityLevel priorityLevel, CollectionCenter origin, Hospital destination, MedicalStaff createdBy)
      Creates a delivery request.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      organType - requested organ type
      priorityLevel - medical priority level
      origin - origin collection center
      destination - destination hospital
      createdBy - medical staff member who created the request

  • Method Details

    • validate

      public boolean validate()
      Validates the request if the center has the organ and the hospital can receive it.
      Returns:
      true if the request is valid

    • cancel

      public void cancel()
      Cancels the request.

    • updateStatus

      public void updateStatus(RequestStatus status)

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the unique mission identifier.
      Returns:
      mission ID

    • getOrganType

      public String getOrganType()

    • getPriorityLevel

      public PriorityLevel getPriorityLevel()
      Returns the priority level of the associated request.
      Returns:
      priority level

    • getRequestDate

      public LocalDateTime getRequestDate()
      Returns the date and time when the request was created.
      Returns:
      request creation date

    • getStatus

      public RequestStatus getStatus()
      Returns the current status of the request.
      Returns:
      request status

    • getOrigin

      public CollectionCenter getOrigin()
      Returns the collection center where the organ is available.
      Returns:
      origin collection center

    • getDestination

      public Hospital getDestination()
      Returns the destination hospital.
      Returns:
      destination hospital

    • getCreatedBy

      public MedicalStaff getCreatedBy()
      Returns the medical staff member who created the request.
      Returns:
      requesting doctor
